title: BrikByteOS Audit Manifest v0
description: Canonical top-level inventory and linkage contract for one BrikByteOS audit bundle.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp indicating when the manifest was created.

artifacts.description: Typed inventory of artifacts contained in the bundle. Artifacts are referenced, not embedded.

schema_inventory.description: Explicit list of schema families and versions represented in the bundle.

root_path_mode.description: Path interpretation mode for artifact references. v0 supports only bundle-relative paths.

bundle.description: Identity and root semantics for one audit bundle.

media_type.description: Optional media/content type for the artifact.

role.description: Optional artifact role or purpose description.

artifact_entry.description: One typed artifact reference in the audit bundle inventory.

family.description: Schema family represented in the bundle.

version.description: Schema version represented in the bundle.

schema_usage.description: One schema family/version pair present in the bundle.

family.description: Schema family governing the referenced artifact.

version.description: Schema version governing the referenced artifact.

schema_ref.description: Schema family/version metadata for a schema-governed artifact.

verdict_artifact_id.description: Artifact id of the canonical verdict artifact in the bundle.

raw_result_artifact_ids.description: Optional artifact ids of raw-result payloads included in the bundle.

normalized_result_artifact_ids.description: Optional artifact ids of normalized-result payloads included in the bundle.

policy_result_artifact_ids.description: Optional artifact ids of policy-evaluation-result payloads included in the bundle.

key_refs.description: References to important artifacts for inspection and downstream bundle use.

status.description: v0 placeholder indicating integrity metadata is not yet fully defined.

notes.description: Optional human-readable note explaining current integrity state.

integrity_extension.description: Reserved structured extension area for future hash/signature metadata without redesigning the manifest.
